User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system with their approval status and token allocation.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth ID of the user.

status.description: The approval status of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (admin or standard user).

tokensPerDay.description: The number of tokens assigned to the user per day.

tokensUsedToday.description: The number of tokens the user has used today.

lastTokenReset.description: The last time the user's tokens were reset.

createdAt.description: When the user record was created.

Log.title: Log
Log.description: Represents a system log entry for usage, errors, or inappropriate content.

uid.description: The UID of the user who triggered the log.

message.description: A descriptive message for the log.

details.description: Additional metadata for the log (e.g., error stack, token amount).

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and their permissions.
